name: node-jquery
title: node-jquery
description:
NodeJS wrapper for jQuery
jQuery is a fast, concise, JavaScript Library that simplifies how you
traverse HTML documents, handle events, perform animations, and add Ajax
interactions to your web pages. jQuery is designed to change the way
that you write JavaScript.
.
This package contains the NodeJS module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-jquery because NodeJS wrapper for jQuery.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-jquery as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-jquery with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-jquery --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
